expected_signals.summary: Google announced the new Video Remix feature for Google Photos.
The launch extends Google's push to add generative AI into consumer apps and keep users inside its ecosystem.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: latest push to bring more generative AI tools into its consumer apps

expected_signals.summary: Google says Video Remix is powered by Gemini Omni.

notes: Rollout is limited to eligible Google AI Plus, Pro, and Ultra subscribers in listed countries. No runnable verifier: this is a static document-labeling task; the anchor quotes are the observable evidence.
